'''Trulalis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Trulalis system]], and it was colonized some [[Time/Legends|time]] around [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]]. The planet was known for its theater. The populace was eliminated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Adalric Cessius Brandl]] and his son, [[Jaalib Brandl]]. Adalric trained Jaalib as an actor on the depopulated world, and also trained [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]] in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] arts, intending to turn her to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and give her to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. Adalric tricked Astin into murdering [[Vialco]], his nemesis, but Jaalib helped Astin escape Trulalis. As punishment, Adalric gave Jaalib to the Emperor instead. Ironically, Jaalib was made the new apprentice of [[Antinnis Tremayne]].

It was also home to a widely regarded university that drew students from surrounding sectors.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In an unpublished short story, [[Patricia A. Jackson]] had Trulalis become the capital of the [[Protectorate (organization)|Protectorate]], an [[Imperial Remnant]] ruled by Adalric and Jaalib. The Brandls restored Trulalis to its former grandeur, especially its theater, and made peace with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Fable was appointed New Republic [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] to the Protectorate and married Jaalib.
